nodes.label: Architecture Decision: Deferred DVA
nodes.rationale: Paystack Dedicated NUBAN requires business approval; auto-provisioning on signup before approval causes every signup to fail-audit the DVA step, so DVA provisioning is deferred to an explicit endpoint or a feature flag.

nodes.label: Architecture Decision: Webhook Replay Defense
nodes.rationale: Paystack retries the same event on network blips; deduping on (provider, event_id) via webhook_events avoids double-credit/double-debit, replaying as a 200 no-op with an audit row instead.

hyperedges.label: Postgres 16-alpine service defined per environment (CI, dev, test)
AutoPay AI request flow: bot/webhooks feed the FastAPI app, which drives Postgres, Paystack, LangGraph agent and APScheduler
API endpoint groups exposed by the FastAPI app under /api/v1
